readingLog.note: Twenty minutes a night before sleep. Mostly history and biography, a memoir when the mood is right, and a mystery saved for the quiet weeks of January.

book.title: A Logistics Life
book.comment: A wartime supply planner who moved a continent on paper and nerve. Read it twice for the parts on staying calm when the plan breaks.

book.title: Kitchen Hours
book.comment: A cook turned host on the long climb from the line to her own table. Warm and unhurried.

book.title: The Off Season
book.comment: A January read, finished in two nights on the beach trip. Light, exactly as intended.

book.title: The Quiet Century
book.comment: Small towns reinventing themselves between two hard winters. Patient and patterned.

book.title: The Stage Manager
book.source: Book club pick for the month

book.title: Bridges and Ledgers
book.source: Saved to the wishlist after a recommendation
